category_sources: Tor Project official resources describe Tor as privacy/anonymity software.
source_facts.description says Tor is an anonymizing overlay network for TCP.
display_name_sources: Official Tor Project site uses the Tor name.
docs_sources: Official Tor Specifications site is maintained by the Tor Project.
Tor repository resources point to the Community Portal for relay documentation.
Tor repository resources point to the official Support Portal for documentation and FAQs.
repo_sources: Tor Project GitLab is the official source-control host for Tor projects.
source_facts.source-archive is distributed from torproject.org for the same project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an anonymizing TCP overlay network.
source_facts.executables lists command-line tools including tor and torify.
